messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: DPA and data residency confirmation required before renewal

Our legal department requires a signed Data Processing Agreement and written confirmation of where our data is hosted before they approve the subscription renewal next month. Who can provide these documents?

response.content: {"category":"billing","priority":"high","sentiment":"positive","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about billing — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
